PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath 'C:\\ProgramData\\Archipelago\\ArchipelagoLauncherDebug.exe' -ArgumentList '"Age Of Mythology Retold Client"' -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { Write-Output \('PID ' + $proc.Id + ' still running — appears to have launched OK'\); Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { Write-Output \('Process exited with code ' + $proc.ExitCode\) })

PowerShell($src = "C:\\Archipelago_stuff\\AOM\\Memory Files\\major_and_minor_gods.docx"; $dst = "C:\\Temp\\gods_docx"; if \(Test-Path $dst\) { Remove-Item $dst -Recurse -Force }; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\($src, $dst\); Get-ChildItem $dst -Recurse | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell($f = "C:\\Archipelago_stuff\\AOM\\Memory Files\\major_and_minor_gods.docx"; Get-Item $f | Format-List Length, LastWriteTime; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($f\) | Select-Object -First 16; $bytes | ForEach-Object { "{0:X2}" -f $_ })
